{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032316070835CF6610CE3234424379"}"},"total":20},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7523027510604792638","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这书真的不错，作者脑洞比较抽象，那还是符合原著的，而且感情也发展待不错，属实爽文"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751597415,"group_id":"7500256886629878809","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/hiaEexMS2RVxuKWKMN/ISx2kr5hHWYxfxbUR7A50pX","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2041134532802109","user_name":"江南山的枢木瑞希"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2041134532802109","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7500256886629878809","book_info":{"abstract":"“亚戈！亚戈！你怎么也坠机了啊……”纷乱战场上，迪莱抱着亚戈的尸体痛哭流涕。
“感觉抗伤压力有点大啊，格兰和赫尔曼一起上都有点顶不住。”奥斯卡一边说着，一边将手放在亚戈肩上，“我复活有点跟不上了。”
“确实啊，真有点难顶。”迪莱赞同地点头。
“可这东西不是你设计的吗？合着你自己也不知道这东西多难打是吧？”刚刚打赢复活赛的亚戈说到。
“我设计这东西本来是恶心你们的，谁知道你们这次还把我拉进来了。”
………………
